summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Trading Bot - all 15 features verified. Backend APIs (health, portfolio, settings, stats, trades/history) working 100%. Frontend dashboard, Trade Analytics tab, Settings panel with Notifications & Telegram sections all functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 15 requested features verified and working correctly
Trade Analytics tab (newly added) shows stats cards (Total Trades, Win Rate, Total P&L, Avg Win, Avg Loss, Open) and P&L charts with Chart.js
Settings > Advanced tab contains all required sections: AI Model Configuration, News Source Configuration, Auto-Trading Controls, Notifications, Telegram Notifications
Desktop Notifications toggles (On Signal, On Entry, On Exit) all present and functional
Telegram Notifications with Enable toggle that reveals Bot Token and Chat ID fields when enabled
LIVE TRADING mode banner showing correctly with Upstox:Disconnected badge (expected without credentials)

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 core endpoints tested: health, portfolio, settings, stats, trades/history)

test_credentials: None required - paper trading mode with demo news
seed_data_creation: Existing trade data: 5 closed trades with 100% win rate, P&L of +12,853
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Trade Analytics tab added to App.js and working with Chart.js charts. Settings panel Advanced tab has Notifications and Telegram sections. All APIs live and returning correct data. MOCKED: Market indices (simulated when Upstox disconnected), Demo news mode when no API keys configured.

tested_features.1_dashboard_loads: PASS - Main dashboard loads with all portfolio cards (Portfolio Value, Total P&L, Active Positions, Win Rate)
tested_features.2_trade_analytics_tab: PASS - Trade Analytics tab exists, shows stats cards (Total Trades=5, Win Rate=100%, Total P&L=+12,853, Avg Win=+2,571, Avg Loss=0, Open=0) and P&L charts
tested_features.3_settings_panel_opens: PASS - Settings panel opens via gear icon button (data-testid='settings-button')
tested_features.4_settings_advanced_sections: PASS - Settings > Advanced tab shows: AI Model Configuration, News Source Configuration, Auto-Trading Controls, Notifications section, Telegram Notifications section
tested_features.5_notifications_toggles: PASS - Notifications section has toggles: Desktop Notifications (ON), On Signal (ON), On Entry (ON), On Exit (ON)
tested_features.6_telegram_notifications: PASS - Telegram section has Enable toggle, when enabled shows Bot Token and Chat ID input fields
tested_features.7_analyze_now_button: PASS - 'Analyze Now' button triggers news fetch, shows 'Fetching...' state during API call
tested_features.8_news_feed_sentiments: PASS - News Feed tab shows fetched news with sentiment badges (BULLISH, BEARISH, NEUTRAL visible)
tested_features.9_signals_tab: PASS - Signals tab exists and loads correctly
tested_features.10_active_trades_tab: PASS - Active Trades tab shows 'No active trades' (all 5 trades closed)
tested_features.11_trade_history_tab: PASS - Trade History tab works, shows message about Upstox trades in LIVE mode
tested_features.12_save_settings: PASS - Save Settings button works, triggers settings save via POST /api/settings/update
tested_features.13_market_ticker: PASS - Market ticker shows live indices (NIFTY 50, SENSEX, BANK NIFTY, FIN NIFTY) with simulated updates
tested_features.14_risk_management: PASS - Risk Management panel shows: Daily Used (₹99,750), Max Per Trade (₹20,000), Today's Trades (5), Today's P&L (₹12,853), Stop Loss (25%)
tested_features.15_api_endpoints: PASS - All tested: GET /api/health (healthy), GET /api/portfolio (returns portfolio data), GET /api/settings (returns settings), GET /api/stats (returns statistics), GET /api/trades/history (returns 5 trades)
